polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Reconciled SmartDocs ingest guidance with current smartdocs/ paths, doctrine auto-promotion, and telemetry names.

blockers.description: Active spec smartdocs/specs/active/docs-authority-model.md still describes doctrine-candidate ingest as candidate-first and says active doctrine promotion requires explicit user approval. The completed implementation routes doctrine-classified ingest directly to smartdocs/doctrine/active/. Closeout reconciled route-local cognition only; active spec reconciliation needs separate operator-approved canon work.

evidence_summary: Reconciled src/smartdocs-engine cognition after POL-314, POL-315, and POL-316 changed SmartDocs ingest behavior. Updated POLARIS.md and SUMMARY.md to describe smartdocs/ as the canonical structure, doctrine-classified ingest auto-promotion into smartdocs/doctrine/active/, and doc-auto-promoted telemetry. No SmartDocs raw documents or cognition notes were ingested or archived. Active docs-authority-model remains inconsistent with the implemented auto-promotion behavior and is recorded for future operator-approved canon reconciliation.
